title: Cucumber Raita

overview.description: A cool, refreshing yoghurt accompaniment with cucumber, cumin and fresh herbs. Perfect alongside spicy Indian dishes.

method: Sprinkle with the salt and leave for 10 minutes.
Squeeze out as much liquid as possible.
Place the yoghurt in a bowl.
Stir in the cucumber, roasted cumin, coriander and mint.
Taste and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Sprinkle with Kashmiri chilli powder before serving, if using.

learning.did-you-know: Raita is designed to cool the palate and balance richly spiced dishes rather than simply adding another flavour.
learning.what-you-will-learn: How to prepare cucumber correctly and season yoghurt so it complements rather than overpowers a meal.

notes.why-its-in-the-chapman-kitchen: A simple, cooling accompaniment that pairs with almost every Indian meal in the collection.
chapman-tips: Always squeeze the cucumber well to stop the raita becoming watery.
Roast and grind your own cumin seeds for the best flavour.
Greek yoghurt gives a thicker, creamier raita.
